## Summary

Briefly describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Spelling correction (override registry update)
- [ ] Verification upgrade (`established_year` PARTIAL → CONFIRMED)
- [ ] Polygon-derived correction
- [ ] Methodology document amendment
- [ ] Code change (build script, validator, test suite)
- [ ] Documentation (README, NOTICE, CHANGELOG, CONTRIBUTING)
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Linked issue

Closes #(issue number)

## Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] CI is passing (validator + mutation test suite)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated with an entry under the unreleased section
- [ ] For data corrections, an audit-trail row is added or updated in `overrides.csv`, `historical_mappings.csv`, or `established_years.csv`
- [ ] For methodology amendments, brand-voice compliance verified per `voice-guide-v1.3.docx` Section B.1.2
- [ ] License compatibility preserved (CC BY 4.0 for data and methodology; MIT for code; upstream licenses preserved on bundled polygons)

## Reviewer notes

Anything the maintainer should pay particular attention to during review.
